name: acorus calamus
title: acorus calamus benefits
description: Acorus calamus treats respiratory issues by alleviating symptoms such as congestion, coughing, and shortness of breath. This benefit is important as respiratory issues can significantly impair daily life, leading to conditions like asthma, bronchitis, and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), which can cause fatigue, anxiety, and decreased quality of life.
